ai_notes: All 9 cells photorealistic. Style channel silent across all 3 rows — van Gogh diagonal brushwork, Starry Night idiom, Monet impressionism all absent. Content channel strong (cat/dog/backpack render cleanly). Style and content NOT disentangled: content-LoRA dominates the merged adapter. Rows visually indistinguishable.
comment: Negative result — valuable for thesis chapter 4 limitations. Naive port of B-LoRA SDXL split [0-8]/[9-18] does NOT work on FLUX double-stream: style information learned at blocks 0-18 has significant mass in blocks 9-18 (which the merge hands to content-LoRA). Will be referenced as evidence that block split must be empirically calibrated per architecture. Next: M01b2 with split [0-12]/[13-18].
verdict: FAIL — но содержательно полезен как negative result
